workflows.title: Create group via bridge API + first message
workflows.prompt: E2E-GROUP-GW1: Use POST http://127.0.0.1:3000/groups/create to create a group named "E2E GW1" with participants +6590016046 and +8801521207499. Set topic "automated test" via /groups/topic. Post in the group exactly: E2E-GW1-LIVE. Reply here with the group JID and DONE when finished. Show a numbered PLAN first, then execute each step.

workflows.title: Create group, add participant, announce meeting poll
workflows.prompt: E2E-GROUP-GW2: Create WhatsApp group "E2E GW2 Meet" via bridge /groups/create with +6590016046 and +8801521207499. In the group, ask everyone to reply with their preferred meeting time next week (SGT). Do not DM the same poll text to individuals. Numbered PLAN first; complete all steps; end with DONE and the @g.us JID.

workflows.title: Full meeting orchestration (group, prefs, book, email)
workflows.prompt: E2E-GROUP-GW3: Multi-step meeting setup. (1) PLAN with ≤8 numbered steps. (2) Create group "E2E GW3 Meet" via http://127.0.0.1:3000/groups/create with +6590016046 and +8801521207499. (3) Ask in the group for preferred meeting times (SGT, 20 min). (4) Simulate or record preferences and pick tomorrow 12:00 SGT. (5) Create a Google Calendar event for that slot (Composio). (6) Send email invites to both participants if Gmail is available; otherwise say what you would send. (7) Post final time in the group. (8) DM me DONE with group JID, calendar link/status, and email status.
